_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of hair shaft progenitors that create a niche for hair pigmentation.

_contextSnippet: P-cadherin is an epithelial cell–cell adhesion molecule and, in HFs, marks the outer root sheath, inner matrix, and hair shaft...SCF is expressed in a subpopulation of P-cadherin+ HF matrix cells and the hair shaft
details: Successfully marked outer root sheath, inner matrix, and hair shaft, confirming SCF expression in P-cadherin+ HF matrix cells
